    While You're Here...

    Learn some coffee terminology from Kenya's finest coffee regions

    Cupping

    The practice of observing the tastes and aromas of brewed coffee

    Terroir

    The complete natural environment in which coffee is grown

    Peaberry

    A rare coffee bean that develops alone in the cherry

    Washing Station

    Where coffee cherries are processed after harvest

    Here are some popular destinations to continue your coffee journey

    "Like a perfectly balanced cup, every great journey begins with the right beans and a little patience."

    — Kenya Coffee Wisdom

    Jowam Coffee Traders LTD.

    Premium Kenyan green coffee exporters connecting specialty roasters worldwide with the finest arabica coffee from Kenya's premier growing regions.
